shadows.name: panel-lift
shadows.purpose: The single deep, soft shadow that floats every instrument panel off the sky.

shadows.name: cta-glow
shadows.purpose: Moonlight glow on the primary button hover only — the lone sanctioned warm glow.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Gold focus ring on form fields and the search pill.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default exponential ease-out for state transitions and panel reveal.

motion.name: twinkle
motion.purpose: Star shimmer — opacity only, never scale.

motion.name: parallax
motion.purpose: Per-layer drift that fakes star-field depth.

motion.name: cloud-drift
motion.purpose: Slow sideways cloud drift + slight bob.

motion.name: moon-float
motion.purpose: Gentle vertical float of the hero moon.

motion.name: rise-in
motion.purpose: Results panels fade+rise in once data arrives.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one signature CTA — Search, Subscribe, Go Back Home.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: Quicksand, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1; padding: 0.8rem 1.6rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 9999px; background: #fefce8; color: #3730a3; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.5) inset, 0 10px 24px -14px rgba(255,232,166,0.7); transition: transform 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), box-shadow 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.6) inset, 0 0 30px rgba(255,232,166,0.45), 0 0 70px rgba(255,232,166,0.18); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255,232,166,0.75); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { font-family: Quicksand, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(124,132,196,0.09); color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(165,180,252,0.16); cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.18s, background-color 0.18s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: rgba(165,180,252,0.30); background: rgba(124,132,196,0.16); }

components.name: Instrument Panel
components.description: Translucent glass surface that floats over the live sky. Top-level only — never nested.
components.html:
Conditions

Clear skies for most of the night.
components.css: .ds-panel { position: relative; background: rgba(20,21,51,0.62); border: 1px solid rgba(165,180,252,0.16); border-radius: 20px; padding: 32px; box-shadow: 0 22px 50px -28px rgba(0,0,0,0.85); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px) saturate(1.1); backdrop-filter: blur(10px) saturate(1.1); } .ds-panel::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0 0 auto 0; height: 1px; border-radius: 20px 20px 0 0; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,232,166,0.35), transparent); } .ds-panel-title { margin: 0; font-family: Herculanum, ui-serif, serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 1.875rem; color: #ffffff; } .ds-panel-body { margin: 0.75rem 0 0; font-family: Quicksand, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #c3c9ef; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Input / Search Field
components.description: Recessed dark well with a gold focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: Quicksand, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #ffffff; background: rgba(7,7,22,0.55); border: 1px solid rgba(165,180,252,0.16); border-radius: 14px; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; transition: border-color 0.18s, box-shadow 0.18s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #969ed0; } .ds-input:hover { border-color: rgba(165,180,252,0.30); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #ffe8a6; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,232,166,0.75); }

components.name: Metric Stat
components.description: A labelled metric with the cloud-cover meter — replaces label:value paragraphs.
components.html:
Cloud cover
14%
components.css: .ds-stat { font-family: Quicksand, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-stat-label { font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; color: #969ed0; } .ds-stat-value { margin-top: 0.375rem; font-size: 1.375rem; font-weight: 600; color: #ffffff; line-height: 1.1; } .ds-meter { margin-top: 0.625rem; height: 4px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(124,132,196,0.22); overflow: hidden; } .ds-meter > span { display: block; height: 100%; border-radius: inherit; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f4dc9f, #ffe8a6); }

components.name: Status Panel (Error)
components.description: Full-bordered tonal status panel — never a side-stripe accent.
components.html:
✗ Error

No management token provided.
components.css: .ds-status-error { border: 1px solid #ef4444; background: rgba(127,29,29,0.5); border-radius: 8px; padding: 24px; font-family: Quicksand, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-status-title { margin: 0 0 0.5rem; font-size: 1.25rem; color: #fee2e2; } .ds-status-body { margin: 0; color: #e0e7ff; }

components.name: Vector Sparkle Star
components.description: Signature: the crisp four-point vector star of the night sky. Flat fill, no glow.

narrative.overview: Moongaz.ing is an old celestial almanac rendered as clean, flat vector art. A real night sky fills the whole screen — a deep-indigo gradient, crisp four-point sparkle stars, flat moonlit clouds, the gold moon — and the interface is a small set of translucent glass 'instrument' panels floating in it. The system is built on restraint: beauty comes from a believable, atmospheric night and from getting out of the way of one practical question — is tonight good? — never from effects. It is explicitly flat and crisp: no glow halos, no bloom, no photoreal haze. Copy is plain and literal; the UI states the moon phase and the numbers and lets the reader judge. One warm accent — moonlight gold — appears rarely and only for functional emphasis.
keyCharacteristics: Full-bleed flat-vector night sky behind translucent glass instrument panels.
White text on deep indigo; one warm gold accent, used sparingly.
Two faces only: Herculanum (display/brand) and Quicksand (all functional UI).
Plain, literal copy — facts, not voice.
Calm by default; delight reserved for moments.

rules.name: The One Gold Rule
rules.body: Moonlight gold is functional, never atmospheric. It marks a focus ring, a meter, a chevron, a CTA hover. It is forbidden as a glow, halo, or bloom on the sky art.

rules.name: The White-Ink Rule
rules.body: Primary text is pure #ffffff. Never tint it cool or warm 'for elegance' — light-gray body text on indigo reads as generic AI dark-mode.

rules.name: The Display-Stays-Out-of-the-UI Rule
rules.body: Herculanum is for the wordmark, page titles, and panel headings — nothing else. Buttons, inputs, labels, data, and microcopy are always Quicksand.

rules.name: The Two-Plane Rule
rules.body: There are exactly two planes: the flat sky (no shadow, no blur on the art) and the lifted glass panels (one deep shadow + backdrop blur). Never nest a panel, never add a third elevation step.

dos: Do keep primary text pure white (#ffffff) on the indigo sky; verify ≥4.5:1.
Do use Herculanum only for the wordmark, page titles, and panel headings; Quicksand for every control, label, and datum.
Do use the cream/indigo-800 pill (#fefce8 / #3730a3) as the one primary CTA.
Do keep moonlight gold rare and functional — focus ring, meter, chevron, CTA hover.
Do state facts plainly: the moon phase, the location, the numbers. Let the user draw the conclusion.
Do keep panels top-level and float them on the one deep shadow + backdrop blur.
donts: Don't add glow, bloom, or halos to the moon, stars, or clouds — shapes stay crisp and flat.
Don't scatter uniform identical dots on a flat gradient (the generic 'AI starfield' screensaver).
Don't reach for 'magical galaxy' kitsch: rainbow nebulae, lens flares, heavy bloom.
Don't write marketing-voice or 'AI-assistant' copy — no taglines, editorializing verdicts, invented features, or padded helper text.
Don't let background motion become busy or compete with the practical answer.
Don't put a display font on buttons, inputs, labels, or data.
Don't use side-stripe borders, tracked all-caps eyebrows, or nested panels.
Don't tint the body text off-white 'for elegance'; that's the generic AI dark-mode tell.
